programs.title: Public Goods Funding Round Q3
programs.summary: Quadratic-matching round for open-source infrastructure, citizen education, and protocol tooling. 28 proposals submitted; 12 funded at an average of 340 credits each.

programs.title: Citizen Bounty Network Expansion
programs.summary: Onboarding 45 new bounty tasks across governance, documentation, and engineering. Completion rate currently tracking 68%.

programs.title: Settlement Layer Stress Test
programs.summary: Planned load and consensus resilience test targeting 10 000 transactions per second with full audit-trail verification.

instruments.title: Protocol-Backed Liquidity Reserve Note
instruments.summary: Short-duration reserve instrument backed by verifiable on-protocol liquidity commitments. Maturity window: 90 days.

instruments.title: Quadratic Funding Matching Certificate
instruments.summary: On-chain certificate representing matched contributions in a completed quadratic funding round.

instruments.title: Reputation-Weighted Governance Token
instruments.summary: Participation-weighted voting token. Weight is derived from verified contribution history and sybil-resistance calculus.

reports.title: Q2 2026 Fiscal Transparency Report
reports.summary: Quarterly budget execution: revenue, expenditure, reserve movements, and variance analysis published on protocol for public audit.

reports.title: Open Market Audit — Exchange Module v2.1
reports.summary: Independent code-and-architecture review of the exchange module. Findings pending final sign-off before publication.

reports.title: Bounty Network Quarterly Review
reports.summary: Completion rates, average time-to-payout, and proposer satisfaction scores. Recommendations for v3.0 bounty protocol.
